results.text: Stepan Shurygin - Stats, Contract, Salary & More. Shurygin is a big goaltender at 6-foot-4, and he plays massive, coming out to the top of the crease to cut down on angles. When combined with his good read of releases, it’s not a surprise that he’s difficult to beat cleanly. Stepan Shurygin Hockey Stats and Profile at hockeydb.com. Statistics of Stepan Shurygin, a hockey player from Samara, Russia born Aug 26 2007 who was active from 2024 to 2026.
